import {OptionButton, SubmitButton, QuizThemeContent} from "../components/Button" import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; export default function Question({quizName}){ const [questionNum, setQuestionNum] = useState(1); let questionText = console.log(quizName.props.name) // console.log(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("HTML"))) return (

Which of these color contrast ratios defines the minimum WCAG 2.1 Level AA requirement for normal text?
